payload.text:
Create a modern, user-friendly, sustainability-focused web platform called RecycleSnap. The platform helps users identify recyclable waste using their device camera or uploaded images and suggests nearby recycling centres based on user location.

The website should be visually clean, eco-themed, mobile-friendly, and easy to navigate.

🌍 Main Purpose

The website encourages proper waste recycling by helping users:

Identify waste materials

Learn recycling instructions

Locate nearby recycling facilities

Track their environmental impact

Participate in eco-friendly activities

👤 User Authentication System

Include a secure user account system with:

Sign up using name, email, and password

Login functionality

Password recovery option

User profile section

Logout functionality

After login, users should be redirected to a personal dashboard.

📸 Waste Scanner Feature

Create a main feature that allows users to identify waste items.

The scanner must:

Request permission to access the device camera

Request permission to access location

Allow users to capture a photo using the camera

Allow users to upload an image from their device

After capturing or uploading the image, the system should:

Analyze the image

Identify the waste category

Display whether the item is recyclable

Show recycling instructions

Provide environmental awareness information

📍 Location & Recycler Finder

After identifying the waste type:

Automatically detect the user’s location

Display nearby recycling centres on an interactive map

Show recycler details including:

Name

Distance from user

Waste types accepted

Operating hours

Contact details

User ratings and reviews

Provide navigation direction option

🗺 Map Interface

The map should:

Display user location

Display recycling centre markers

Allow clicking markers to view recycler details

Provide filtering based on waste types accepted

Include search functionality for recyclers

📊 User Dashboard

Create a dashboard that shows:

User scan history

List of scanned waste items

Recycling statistics

Environmental impact summary

Eco score or reward points

Saved recycling centres

🏆 Gamification System

Encourage user engagement by including:

Reward points for scanning recyclable items

Achievement badges

Eco score calculation

Progress tracking system

📝 Recycler Contribution Feature

Allow users to contribute recycling information by:

Adding new recycling centres

Uploading recycler photos

Submitting accepted waste types

Writing reviews

Submissions should go through an approval process before being publicly visible.

📚 Educational Section

Include a knowledge section containing:

Waste segregation guides

Recycling awareness articles

Tips for reducing waste

Environmental sustainability information

🔔 Notification System

Provide user alerts for:

Nearby recycling opportunities

Recycling reminders

Environmental awareness updates

🔍 Internal Logic Requirements

The system should internally:

Validate user input before submission

Check camera and location permission status

Provide fallback options if permissions are denied

Prevent duplicate recycler entries

Automatically categorize waste items based on image analysis

Store scan history linked to user accounts

Calculate eco scores based on recycling activity

Filter recycler results based on waste compatibility

Provide error handling and user-friendly messages

Ensure privacy and secure handling of user data

🎨 User Interface Design Requirements

The design should:

Use an eco-friendly theme inspired by sustainability and nature

Be responsive across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices

Provide smooth navigation and intuitive layout

Use clear icons and visual indicators

Include loading animations during scanning and searching

Provide success and error feedback messages

🏠 Required Pages

Include the following pages:

Landing Page

Login / Signup Page

Waste Scanner Page

Scan Result Page

Recycler Map Page

Recycler Details Page

User Dashboard

Add Recycler Page

Educational Content Page

User Profile Page

🔐 Privacy & Permission Handling

The platform must:

Clearly explain why camera and location permissions are required

Allow users to control data usage

Provide secure authentication and session handling

Protect user-generated content and personal data

🌱 Overall Goal

The website should promote responsible waste management while providing an engaging and educational user experience that motivates users to recycle regularly.

**Defining Project Scope**

Okay, I'm firming up the core scope for "RecycleSnap." It's centered on a web platform. I'm focusing on those critical features: a waste scanner using AI (Gemini) for recyclables, a locator for nearby recycling centers via a map, and standard user authentication (sign-up, login, profile). I'm keeping it concise and sustainable.


**Expanding Feature Set**

I've been fleshing out the dashboard. I'm prioritizing scan history, eco-score, and badges, as well as notification systems. Gamification will come in the form of points and badges. I'm planning to incorporate educational content. Also, I will include a contribution feature for adding recyclers and reviews. I've considered technical constraints: React 18+, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Gemini API, and a single-page application with a HashRouter. I will also incorporate persistent UI elements and an eco-friendly theme. I've created a plan to handle the file structure, starting with permissions in `metadata.json` all the way to detailed page structures like the `LandingPage`. The architecture will be centered on an initial scan result page after an AI-analysis.

entries.description: App metadata with required permissions for camera and geolocation.
HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Font Awesome for icons.
React entry point initializing the application.

import { WasteCategory, Recycler } from './types';

export const MOCK_RECYCLERS: Recycler[] = [
  {
    id: '1',
    name: 'GreenEarth Recycling Hub',
    distance: '0.8 miles',
    acceptedTypes: [WasteCategory.PLASTIC, WasteCategory.METAL, WasteCategory.GLASS],
    hours: '9:00 AM - 6:00 PM',
    phone: '+1 (555) 123-4567',
    rating: 4.8,
    lat: 40.7128,
    lng: -74.0060,
    address: '123 Sustainability Ave, New York'
  },
  {
    id: '2',
    name: 'Eco-Stream Collection',
    distance: '1.2 miles',
    acceptedTypes: [WasteCategory.PAPER, WasteCategory.ORGANIC],
    hours: '8:00 AM - 5:00 PM',
    phone: '+1 (555) 987-6543',
    rating: 4.5,
    lat: 40.7306,
    lng: -73.9352,
    address: '456 Greenway Blvd, Brooklyn'
  },
  {
    id: '3',
    name: 'ByteRecycle Electronics',
    distance: '2.5 miles',
    acceptedTypes: [WasteCategory.ELECTRONIC],
    hours: '10:00 AM - 7:00 PM',
    phone: '+1 (555) 246-8135',
    rating: 4.9,
    lat: 40.7580,
    lng: -73.9855,
    address: '789 Circuit Lane, Manhattan'
  }
];

export const EDUCATIONAL_ARTICLES = [
  {
    id: '1',
    title: 'The Plastic Problem',
    category: 'Environment',
    readTime: '5 min',
    summary: 'Understanding the impact of single-use plastics on our oceans.',
    icon: 'fa-droplet'
  },
  {
    id: '2',
    title: 'Home Composting 101',
    category: 'Tips',
    readTime: '8 min',
    summary: 'Start your zero-waste journey by composting food scraps.',
    icon: 'fa-seedling'
  },
  {
    id: '3',
    title: 'E-Waste: A Hidden Crisis',
    category: 'Awareness',
    readTime: '6 min',
    summary: 'Why your old smartphones shouldn\'t end up in the bin.',
    icon: 'fa-microchip'
  }
];

export const BADGES = [
  { id: 'b1', name: 'Eco Starter', icon: 'fa-leaf', description: 'Completed first scan' },
  { id: 'b2', name: 'Waste Warrior', icon: 'fa-shield-halved', description: 'Scanned 10 items' },
  { id: 'b3', name: 'Planet Protector', icon: 'fa-earth-americas', description: 'Achieved 100 Eco Score' }
];
